Custom CSS for theming and typography in the Pebble firmware documentation.

# Purpose
The CSS file defines styles for a web application, focusing on theme colors and typography. It specifies primary and secondary color variables for both light and dark themes using CSS custom properties. The file also sets the margin properties for the `#rtd-footer-container` to ensure consistent spacing. It includes `@font-face` rules to load different weights of the "Tomorrow" font from specified paths, which are then applied to headings and specific text elements like `.caption`, `.logo__title`, and `.home-title`. This ensures a consistent visual style across the application by using the "Tomorrow" font for headings and specified text elements.
